query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: A close-up photograph of a digital display showing five parallel diagonal red lines against a cyan background. The microscopic grid structure of the screen is visible across the entire surface, creating a fine mesh texture. The red lines are evenly spaced and run from the lower left toward the upper right.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up photograph of a digital display showing five parallel diagonal red lines against a cyan background. The microscopic grid structure of the screen is visible across the entire surface, creating a fine mesh texture with prominent pixelation and aliasing that foregrounds the digital medium. The abstract composition emphasizes geometric lines, color fields, and screen texture over representational subject matter.
